subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Your letter was received. You had inquired about the duty of the friends in Kazakhistan, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه شما رسید سوال نموده بودید که تکلیف احبای قزاق چیست زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority
